title: Colombo & Hurd Reviews & Testimonials
content:
## Colombo & Hurd Reviews & Testimonials
Trusted by clients from over 100 countries, our firm is recognized for our legal excellence, professionalism, and results. See why professionals, entrepreneurs, and investors choose us and what makes our legal team stand out.

## More than 20 years of Excellence in Immigration Law
Trusted around the world by professionals, investors, and families
Proven results in securing visas & green cards
Representing professionals, investors, and businesses
Focused on one mission: delivering life-changing immigration results

## Clients Testimonials
For EB-2 NIW cases, I found Colombo & Hurd to be an outstanding law firm that delivered exceptional service and results. From the very beginning, they demonstrated deep expertise, professionalism, and a clear understanding of the USCIS requirements for a successful National Interest Waiver petition. Their team, including a former USCIS adjudicator, skillfully guided me through each step, ensuring that my case was prepared with strong evidence, well-structured arguments, and attention to every detail. What impressed me most was their transparent communication and willingness to address all my questions, which made the entire process stress-free. They kept me informed at every stage, and their strategic approach gave me confidence that my case was in capable hands. Thanks to their hard work and dedication, my petition was handled smoothly and effectively. Overall, I found great satisfaction in working with Colombo & Hurd and would confidently recommend them to anyone pursuing an EB-2 NIW approval .
I had my EB-5 process approved through Colombo & Hurd, and today I already have my green card. I highly recommend the services of this firm. Dr. Carlos Colombo and his team of professionals are highly qualified and experienced.
I enjoyed working with Colombo & Hurd in my successful EB-1A case. Besides I dealt with wonderful humans, also the team was highly professional, responsive, flexible, and caring. I truly was in good hands and definitely couldn’t see myself walking and succeeding in this path without their amazing guidance!
An RFE to an EB1a petition can be devastating especially when you have put your all and you feel the team has done a great job. My profile sat at the intersection of industry and research in public health. Low citation count of 47 but highly impactful interventions and innovations adopted at national and international scale as policies. The team at Colombo and Hurd handled my RFE with calm and clarity. Systematically dissected every aspect and restored my faith that we could still win an approval. Jason Qui was kind and respectful and also responsive to my concerns. And now here we are!. I’m approved. An MD , Public Health Specialist and Digital Health Innovator.
They are the best team ever! We felt really blessed to have this law firm representing us with one of the most important goals in our lives. We recommend this team. They are trustful, honest, transparent and everything that they said to us was just on time! Thank you for everything that you did!
I highly recommend Colombo & Hurd! From the very beginning, they showed a level of professionalism, commitment, and empathy that far exceeded my expectations. Every step of the process was handled with clarity, transparency, and truly impeccable attention to detail.
Colombo & Hurd did an amazing job with my case and got me approved! The team was professional, friendly, and always available to answer my questions. They were transparent about every step of the process, so I always knew what was going on. What really stood out was their attention to detail and how much they genuinely cared about my case. I never felt rushed or overlooked. I highly recommend them for anyone looking for reliable and supportive legal help!
From the very beginning, their support was constant, their feedback was clear, and they were very efficient with every request or question that arose during the process, making every requirement clearer and easier to build. I entrusted the most important project of my life to them, and I feel they met my expectations 100%. I will always be grateful for having found them and trusted their experience and guidance.
